_comment: bridge_config.json — tunes bridge.py v3 without touching source code. All keys are optional; missing keys fall back to built-in defaults.
_note_renamed: RENAMED from 'ai_override_below' in v2 — update your config!
_note_concurrent: 0 = auto (4 × cpu_count). Your old value was 16 — leave at 0 unless you need a hard cap.
_note_ai_workers: 0 = auto (cpu_count). Your old value was 4 — auto will use all cores.
_note_feature_workers: NEW v3 — ProcessPool workers for CPU-bound feature extraction. 0 = auto (cpu_count ÷ 2, min 2).
_note_batch_size: Max feature vectors per predict_proba() call. Raise to 128 on high-RAM servers.
_note_batch_flush: Max milliseconds before a partial batch is force-flushed. Lower = less latency, slightly less throughput.
_note_redis: Leave empty to use local LRU only. Set to 'redis://host:6379/0' for multi-node / global deployments.
_note_priority: Files in these paths are yielded first in folder scans so analysts see high-risk results sooner.
_note_ensemble: Add extra models for blended scoring. Example: [{"path": "models/modelB.pkl", "weight": 0.4}]
